productDisplayName: ADIDAS Neo Men T-6 Night White Shoes
description: The adidas T-6 Night is soccer shoe with style, as vouched for by david beckham, the sport's most famous face. A simple, sleek shoe with flat one-piece outsole that reaches onto the upper at the heel high enough to act as a secure foot guard.UpperLeather upper with aggressive stitch detailingadidas 3-Stripe overlays at the midfoot regionPadded synthetic innerReinforced overlay at the heel collarCentral lace-upsPadded tongue with brandingMidsoleFoam midsoleOutsoleTPU outsole with tyre tread pattern with branding at the heelOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the heel to act as a heel guardShoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
